summary: Frontend testing completed for Blendlink app. All main pages load correctly without critical JavaScript errors. Fixed one bug in FacebookShareOverlay.jsx where API response structure was not handled correctly.

fixed_bugs.issue: allPhotos.sort is not a function - API returns {photos: [...]} but code expected array directly

critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket connection refused errors (ws://localhost:443/ws) are EXPECTED as noted by main agent - API polling fallback handles this
WebGL not supported warning is expected in headless browser environment - face-api.js gracefully degrades
Some 404 errors for resources but not affecting functionality

success_rate.backend: N/A - backend only testing done in iteration_88

context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend pages verified working: Login, Feed, Games, Photo Game, Minted Photos, Profile, Wallet, Marketplace, Notifications. Fixed FacebookShareOverlay.jsx bug. WebSocket errors are expected and handled by polling fallback.

pages_tested.login: PASS - Redirects to feed after successful login
pages_tested.feed: PASS - Shows posts, stories, quick links
pages_tested.games: PASS - Shows Photo Battle Arena, Casino Games, Mini Games
pages_tested.photo_game: PASS - Shows PVP Battle Arena with Create/Join/History/Watch/Bot options
pages_tested.minted_photos: PASS - Shows 12 photos with portfolio value $4.51B
pages_tested.profile: PASS - Shows user info, edit profile, albums, social features, medal showcase

console_errors_analysis.websocket_errors: EXPECTED - ws://localhost:443/ws connection refused, handled by polling fallback
console_errors_analysis.webgl_warning: EXPECTED - face-api.js WebGL not supported in headless browser
console_errors_analysis.404_errors: MINOR - Some resource 404s but not affecting functionality
